data.title: WEIZE 20 24 Inch Kids Mountain Bike,Kids Bike for Girls Age 6-14 Year Old,6 Speed Kid Bicycle with Front Suspension Fork,Adju

features: Efficient Braking System:This kid mountain bicycle is equipped with front and rear caliper brakes
providing high responsiveness and reliable braking power. Whether on wet surfaces or steep downhill paths
the braking system ensures quick deceleration and control
safeguarding young riders during their adventures
Stable Riding:This kids bike adopts a high carbon steel frame
which has excellent impact resistance and long-lasting durability. The front suspension fork absorbs the impact of bumpy terrain
Adjustable and Ergonomic Design:The bike for kids features a height-adjustable saddle (20-inch: 63–71 cm

24-inch: 69–84 cm) and an ergonomic seat designed for comfort during extended rides. It is easy to adapt to growing children and ensure that kid bicycles maintain a perfect fit at multiple stages of development

Designed for Girls:20 inch girls bike is suitable for 6-11 years (42-56 Inch) kids.24 inch girls bike is suitable for 8-14 years (54-66 Inch) kids. Each kids bike is designed specifically for a particular age group
Quick Installation Experience:This children's bike is 85% pre installed and comes with clear instructions and online assembly video guidance. It can be easily installed in about 20 minutes

relatedProducts.Title: RoyalBaby Kids Mountain Bike for Boys and Girls, Ultra-Light Aluminum 20-26 Inch Wheel Bicycle for 6-14 Years Old Children, 7/21-Speeds Drivetrain
relatedProducts.Features: FRAME MATERIAL & LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN – High-strength aluminum alloy frame, lightweight yet durable, with strong corrosion resistance, suitable for riding on various terrains. | PRECISION GEARING & BRAKES – This mountain bike features 7-speed drivetrain with front/rear disc brakes ensures effortless climbing and reliable stopping power. | SHOCK-ABSORBING FORK - High-response suspension fork absorbs bumps and vibrations for smoother rides on rough terrain. | KNOBBY MTB TIRES – Wide knobby tread provides superior traction on mud/gravel, with puncture-resistant layer to prevent flats. | ALWAYS RELIABLE – RoyalBaby bike complies with the CPSC and EN-71 standards, and is trusted by millions of families from over 80 countries. Customers will be provided with high level warranty and local 24 hours service when contacting RoyalBaby for any queries.

relatedProducts.Product_Description: The RoyalBaby 20"24" 26" kids mountain bike combines performance and safety with its ultra-light aluminum frame that's lighter than steel yet durable enough for bumps and jumps. Featuring a smooth-shifting 21-speed Shimano-style drivetrain, young riders can easily tackle hills and flat roads while developing cycling skills. The shock-absorbing suspension fork minimizes bumps for comfortable rides on rough terrain, gravel paths, or sidewalks, while all-terrain knobby tires provide excellent traction on various surfaces. Safety comes first with reliable front and rear hand brakes featuring easy-to-squeeze levers for confident stopping power. The adjustable seat and handlebars grow with your child, while non-slip pedals and ergonomic grips ensure comfort on longer rides. Finished in a vibrant green with a sleek, modern design, this bike is as stylish as it is functional - perfect for young adventurers ages 10-14 to explore their surroundings with confidence and ease.

Features_Specs.Special Feature: 7-Speed Drivetrain, Adjustable Seat, Front and Rear Disc Brakes, Lightweight, Suspension Fork
Features_Specs.Additional Features: 7-Speed Drivetrain, Adjustable Seat, Front and Rear Disc Brakes, Lightweight, Suspension Fork
Features_Specs.Warranty Description: ‎RoyalBaby provide lifetime warranty for bike frames and front forks, and free replacement for easy-wearing parts within 6 months. If you have issues such as missing parts, defects or damages, please feel free to contact RoyalBaby service. You can send an email to [service@royal-bike.com] and a specialist will come to help you out, or leave a message by WhatsApp to +1 (626) 628-4176, we will reply in 6 hours. You can also call 888-881-2453 on Mon – Fri, 9:00AM – 5:00PM CST.
